meaning: <拉>(某人)发明,(某人) 设计(=he invented it 或sheinvented it)
examples: Every piece bears his unhumble Latin motto, Invenit et Fecit: I invented it and I made it.
Even some of his own people wish he would go a little easier sometimes, but Journe says it's the only way he can protect the integrity of Invenit et Fecit.
